title: polystichum alcicorne
intro: Polystichum alcicorne, also known as the Horned Holly Fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to Japan, characterized by its distinctive horn-like fronds and dark green foliage. The medicinal properties of Polystichum alcicorne are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Polystichum alcicorne is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
